auth.identityProtected: Your identity is protected. Anonymous sessions leave no trace.
auth.confirmLink: We sent you a confirmation link.
auth.consentRequired: Please agree to the Privacy Policy to continue.

onboarding.safeDesc: Echo is a confidential space. Your conversations are private, encrypted, and never shared. You control what you share and when.
onboarding.anonymousDesc: No real names required. Your identity is protected by a generated alias. You can explore freely without fear of being identified.
onboarding.howItWorksDesc: When you're ready, you'll be matched with a trained volunteer for a private conversation called a Cocoon session. You can also journal, join community circles, and track your healing journey.
onboarding.changeAnytime: You can change this anytime in settings.
onboarding.culturalContextDesc: Optional — helps us match you with a volunteer who understands your background.
onboarding.culturalPlaceholder: Share anything about your cultural background, faith, community, or identity that might help us support you better...
onboarding.selectGoals: Select up to 5 areas you'd like to focus on.

home.reachOut: Reach out whenever you're ready. A trained volunteer is here for you.

cocoon.title: Cocoon
cocoon.subtitle: Your safe conversation space
cocoon.startCocoon: Start a Cocoon session to connect with a volunteer.

chat.findingDesc: A trained volunteer will be matched with you shortly. You'll be notified when they're ready.
chat.clickStart: Click "Start Session" to begin your conversation.
chat.crisisProtocol: The seeker may be experiencing a crisis. Follow the Echo crisis protocol: stay calm, listen actively, and refer to emergency resources if needed.

journal.title: Healing Journal
journal.subtitle: Private reflections on your journey
journal.emptyDesc: Start capturing your thoughts, feelings, and milestones.

community.title: Community
community.subtitle: Resources, support, and encouragement from those who understand.
community.encouragementPlaceholder: Write something kind for someone who needs it…
community.noEncouragements: No encouragements yet. Be the first to share one.

profile.title: Profile
profile.safetyDesc: If you or someone you know is in immediate danger, please reach out to local emergency services.

upgrade.title: Secure Your Account
upgrade.desc: Add an email and password to keep your data safe. All your journal entries and session history will be preserved.
upgrade.passwordMin: Password must be at least 6 characters
upgrade.successDesc: Your account is now linked to your email.

export.title: Export Your Data
export.desc: Download all your data (profile, journal, sessions, feedback) as a JSON file.

deletion.title: Delete Account
deletion.desc: Permanently delete your account and all associated data. This action cannot be undone.
deletion.warning: This will permanently delete your profile, journal entries, session history, and all other data. This cannot be reversed.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.desc: Session message content is automatically removed 90 days after a session ends. Session metadata is retained for safety oversight.

feedback.seekerDesc: Your feedback helps us improve and supports your healing journey.
feedback.volunteerDesc: Reflect on this session for your own growth.
feedback.howFeelAfter: How do you feel after this session?
feedback.endorseDesc: Select up to 3 skills that describe your volunteer (optional).
feedback.anythingElse: Anything else you'd like to share?
feedback.seekerPlaceholder: How could we improve your experience?
feedback.volunteerPlaceholder: What went well? What could you improve?

crisis.title: It sounds like you may be going through something serious
crisis.subtitle: Your safety matters most. If you're in immediate danger, please reach out to a crisis service:

volunteer.notApproved: Your profile is pending approval. You'll be able to accept sessions once approved.
